mapper.sql: SELECT ID, DISPATCH_RELEASE_ID, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, SPECS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_DISPATCH_RELEASE_DETAIL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_DISPATCH_RELEASE_DETAIL(ID, DISPATCH_RELEASE_ID, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, SPECS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{dispatchReleaseId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfoNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ton, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specs, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_DISPATCH_RELEASE_DETAIL
DISPATCH_RELEASE_ID = #{dispatchReleaseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_INFO_NO = #{cargoInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_OWNER_ID = #{cargoOwnerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_OWNER_NAME = #{cargoOwnerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TON = #{ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PACKING_CODE = #{packingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PACKING_NAME = #{packingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECS = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

begin
UPDATE T_BUS_DISPATCH_RELEASE_DETAIL SET
DISPATCH_RELEASE_ID = #{dispatchReleaseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_INFO_NO = #{cargoInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_OWNER_ID = #{cargoOwnerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_OWNER_NAME = #{cargoOwnerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TON = #{ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PACKING_CODE = #{packingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PACKING_NAME = #{packingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECS = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id};
end;
